title: leucozoma telfordii
intro: Leucozoma telfordii, also known as Himalayan pheasant berry or Telford's pheasant berry, is a plant species in the family Ericaceae. This plant is native to the Himalayas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucozoma telfordii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Leucozoma telfordii are typically made by infusing the leaves or berries in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
